file(GLOB_RECURSE PVRTC_SOURCES CONFIGURE_DEPENDS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/*.cpp ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/*.c ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/*.h)

add_library(pvrtc STATIC ${PVRTC_SOURCES})

target_include_directories(pvrtc PUBLIC ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR})

set_property(GLOBAL PROPERTY USE_FOLDERS ON)
set_property(TARGET pvrtc PROPERTY FOLDER "thirdparty")
